data.title: California Becomes The First State To Sue Trump Over 'Unlawful' Tariff Regime Seeking To Declare It 'Null And Void': 'Global Trade Policy Is Not Just A Game'
data.description: In a groundbreaking move, California has launched a lawsuit against President Donald Trump, seeking to put an end to his extensive tariff regime, which the state feels is being illegally implemented.

data.title: Trump Joins Japan Tariff Talks, Calls Progress 'Big' As $63 Billion Trade Surplus Looms
data.description: President Donald Trump joined preliminary tariff negotiations with Japanese officials on Wednesday, calling the discussions a "great honor".

data.title: Bhutan Flexes Hydropower For Bitcoin Mining, Explores Sale Of 'Green' Coins
data.description: Bhutan is contemplating the use of its hydropower resources for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) mining to stimulate its economy without compromising its environmental goals.

data.title: Sheryl Sandberg Testimony In Meta Antitrust Trial Touches On Efforts To Stifle Ads From Google Plus, KakaoTalk — Mark Zuckerberg Says TikTok Bigger Than Facebook, Instagram Combined
data.description: Former Meta COO Sheryl Sandberg testified in an antitrust trial, revealing efforts to block ads from competitors like Google Plus and KakaoTalk, while Mark Zuckerberg acknowledged TikTok's dominance over Facebook and Instagram.

data.title: TikTok's US Policy Chief Steps Down As Bidding War Heats Up After Trump Extends Deadline: Report
data.description: TikTok's U.S. public policy chief, Michael Beckerman, is leaving his Washington-based role to transition to a global advisory position.
